name: Pineapple Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, Italian dressing, salt, and pepper in a bowl until combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 8 patties.
3. Press a pineapple slice onto each patty.
4. Wrap each patty with a slice of bacon.
5. Secure each patty with a wooden toothpick.
6. In another bowl, mix remaining ingredients (remaining barbecue sauce, brown sugar, honey, and lemon juice) until well combined.
7. Place the patties in a glass baking dish that measures 13 x 9 inches.
8. Pour the mixture of remaining barbecue sauce, brown sugar, honey, and lemon juice over the patties.
9. Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours.
10. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
11. Grill the patties, pineapple side down, for about 10 minutes, turning them occasionally.
12. Brush the patties with barbecue sauce.
13. Grill the patties another 10 minutes or until they are cooked through and browned on the outside.
14. Serve the burgers hot with additional barbecue sauce drizzled over the top.
